column1: # Gene definition file for Pan troglodytes (PanTro) — version 5
#           Pseudogene added to prevent NaN from AmpliCoNE-build
#   DAZ   — 4 regions spanning 2 palindrome arm pairs (~60 kb each)
#   RBMY  — 6 canonical copies (truncated: first 8 kb used due to minus/plus
#           Note: truncation avoids overlap with intronic repeats
#   TSPY  — 21 copies (18 canonical + 2 at distal locus + 1 pseudogene
#           LOC112207447 with internal frameshift; duplicate coord retained
#   CONTROL — 9 regions spanning single-copy portions of chrY
#             (coordinates derived from DDX3Y, KDM5D, USP9Y, UTY, ZFY,
